steps.title: Identify the defining signal
steps.content: Scope means the extent of his total output. The key information: he produced “more than two thousand drawings and paintings.”

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A positions the specific work as “just one of more than two thousand,” which shows how the single piece fits within his enormous body of work.

Choices B, C, and D focus on details about this single work: its composition, sale price, and auction date.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
